mnemonics.title: Attack Types
mnemonics.content: E-P-M-M: Evasion, Poisoning, Model Inversion, Membership Inference

acronyms.usage: Used to generate adversarial examples via gradient ascent

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a wavy line with tiny arrows pushing samples across it

analogies.analogy: Optical illusions for AI - humans see normal images, models see manipulated patterns
